tasks.title: Auto Task
tasks.description: SESSIONGUARD — LANDING PAGE BUILD TASK ======================================== Build a complete single-page landing page for SessionGuard. Return complete HTML/CSS/JS in one file. No frameworks needed.  PRODUCT: SessionGuard is a session intelligence platform that helps  players track, analyze, and improve their decision-making  using AI-powered behavioral coaching.  TONE: Professional. Data-driven. Trustworthy. NOT casino-themed. Think: Bloomberg, trading platforms, performance analytics.  SECTIONS (in order):  1. HERO    Headline: "Turn Every Session Into Intelligence"    Sub: "Real-time AI coaching, behavior analysis, and session     tracking — built for serious players."    CTA button: "Download Free" → links to     https://github.com/Thatisshayan/sessionguard/releases    Secondary link: "See how it works" → scrolls to features  2. PROBLEM (3 cards)    "Playing blind" — no data on your own patterns    "Tilt costs money" — escalating bets after losses    "No accountability" — nothing tracking discipline  3. SOLUTION — HOW IT WORKS (3 steps)    Step 1: Upload your session CSV or record live    Step 2: AI analyzes your patterns in real time      Step 3: Coach alerts you before tilt becomes expensive  4. FEATURES (6 feature cards with icons)    🥊 Live AI Coach — fires every 3 spins, detects tilt    📊 Session Intelligence — RTP, drawdown, win rate tracking    🔍 Behavior Analysis — 8 pattern detectors    📈 Trend Engine — session health score 0-100    🎯 OCR Live Reading — reads your screen automatically    📋 Reports & Export — PDF, Excel, evidence packages  5. SOCIAL PROOF (placeholder section)    "Built for players who take their sessions seriously"    3 placeholder testimonial cards  6. DOWNLOAD CTA    "SessionGuard is free. No subscription. No account required."    Big download button → GitHub releases URL above    Small text: "Windows 10/11 · Requires Python · Free forever"  7. FOOTER    GitHub link, brief description  DESIGN REQUIREMENTS: - Dark theme: background #0a0c10, surface #111318 - Accent: electric blue #3b82f6 - Font: Inter from Google Fonts - Fully responsive (mobile + desktop) - Smooth scroll between sections - Subtle animations on scroll (fade in) - No external JS libraries except Google Fonts  RETURN: One complete index.html file ready to open in browser.
